name: Kaito Ryūjin
bio: The harmony between human and nature is crucial for our survival. We must strive to balance our desires with the gravity of reality.

name: Akira Kōgai
bio: The only constant is change, and we must adapt to the ever-shifting tides of fate. Gravity-conscious realism demands that we confront reality head-on.

name: Nanako Shūkō
bio: In the midst of chaos, we must cultivate patience and compassion. Gravity's pull can be overwhelming, but our spirits remain buoyed by hope and faith.

name: Kaidō
bio: Thrilled by the possibilities of human imagination, Kaidō believes that creativity is the spark that drives progress. He advocates for bold experimentation and calculated risk-taking.
